questions.question: How many seats are authorized on the board or committee, how many are currently filled, and how many vacancies exist?
questions.answer: The Yorktown Conservation Board is authorized to have 10 members, appointed by the Town Board of the Town of Yorktown, each serving terms not exceeding three years (§ 10-7, adopted 5-17-1988 by L.L. No. 22-1988). The sources do not specify how many seats are currently filled or how many vacancies exist.
sourceRefs: § 10-7, Town of Yorktown Code, Chapter 10, Article II, adopted 5-17-1988 by L.L. No. 22-1988
questions.gap: The statute only provides the authorized seat count (10). Current filled seats and vacancies are not listed in the provided sources, falling short of best practice which requires all three data points.
nextPrompts: Check the Town of Yorktown official website or Clerk's Office for a current roster of Conservation Board members to determine filled seats and vacancies.
Request meeting minutes or Town Board resolutions from 2024-2025 that may reflect recent appointments or vacancies on the Conservation Board.

questions.question: Does the website clearly list member names, appointment method, term lengths, and expiration dates?
questions.answer: The statute specifies that the Yorktown Conservation Board consists of 10 members appointed by the Town Board of the Town of Yorktown. Members serve at the pleasure of the Town Board for a term not exceeding three years. No member names or term expiration dates are listed in the provided statute text.
sourceRefs: Town of Yorktown, NY, Chapter 10, Article II, § 10-7, adopted 5-17-1988 by L.L. No. 22-1988
questions.gap: The statute provides appointment method and maximum term length, but does not list individual member names or specific term expiration dates. Full alignment with best practice would require a roster with each member's name, appointment basis, and term expiration date.
nextPrompts: Does the Town of Yorktown maintain a current roster of Conservation Board members with appointment dates and term expirations on its official website?
Are Conservation Board member appointments recorded in Town Board meeting minutes with specific term start and end dates?
